title: Eva Series Quiz
wikitext:
[]: Eva Series Quiz             Quote Post by nomis1242 » Sat Feb 19, 2011 7:23 pm Just for a bit of fun, here's a quiz I made to test your EvaGeekiness. It relates to the DC series only, not the movies or rebuild. Hopefully the answers are all correct, but if you can prove me wrong, you get double points for the question! Post your score and the time taken for the quiz (ie everyone can get 100% thanks to the interwebs, but we'll see who knows most without having to look it up). Eva (tv series only) Quiz Easy (1 point each) 1 How many sisters does Hikari have? 2 What tracks does Shinji continually listen to on his S-DAT? 3 Which Eva is the first production Eva? 4 How many angels are there (excluding Misato’s statement that humans are also angels)? 5 What are the names of the Maji? (bonus point if you can match them up to the three facets of Naoko) Medium (2 points each) 6 If Gaghiel is the angel of fish, what is Armisael (Rei contamination) the angel of? 7 What was Kozo doing immediately after second impact (1 point)? Where (1 point)? 8 What is the password that stops Jet Alone from going into meltdown? 9 What day was second impact? 10 What is the main colour of unit-00? (hint: >1 answer required) Hard (3 points each) 11 What colours are Toji’s tracksuit? 12 Misato’s alleged ep 23 sexual advance on Shinji is highly controversial, due to different translations dub vs sub! What are the dub and sub versions of her line? 13 Who of these appear in the opening credits: Hikari, Lillith (her body, not Rei), Shamshel, Kaji, Naoko? 14 What causes all life to be destroyed in Antarctica? (be specific, what is the actual mechanism not just “Adam goes nuts”) 15 Which of the pilots realise that their mother is somehow present in their Eva? 16 For 100 million points: Without using any references (eg the internet or watching the series), work out which episodes Pen Pen appears in... SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: eva series quiz             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Sat Feb 19, 2011 8:01 pm nomis1242 wrote: 6 If Gaghiel is the angel of fish, what is Arael (Asuka mind-rape) the angel of? SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: eva series quiz             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Feb 19, 2011 8:29 pm nomis1242 wrote: 16 For 100 million points: Without using any references (eg the internet or watching the series), work out which episodes Pen Pen appears in...

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Sat Feb 19, 2011 8:29 pm It's nice to see an Eva quiz that isn't obvious crap. I didn't know some of these. Good thing I'm rewatching it over the next week or so.

[]: Re: eva series quiz             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sat Feb 19, 2011 11:57 pm nomis1242 wrote: 13 Who of these appear in the opening credits: Lillith, Hikari, Kaji, Yui? SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Sun Feb 20, 2011 12:34 am 19 Points. I think that's pretty good.

[]: Re: eva series quiz             Quote Post by nomis1242 » Sun Feb 20, 2011 12:59 am Thanks for all the comments! Any scores and times? I was actually bracing for howls of protest about the trick question! And 15+16 which rely on a bit of analysis so they're a bit subjective. So there's no issue with them, then? KnightmareX13 wrote: Birds should be one of the answers source: [url]http://wiki.evageeks.org/Arael[/url]

[]: Re: eva series quiz             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Feb 20, 2011 1:40 am nomis1242 wrote: I saw that frame too, but I think it's a young Ritsuko.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sun Feb 20, 2011 4:33 am It's Yui: [url]http://evacommentary.org/op/op_2.html[/url] See #72.

[]:             Quote Post by nomis1242 » Sun Feb 20, 2011 6:18 am Thanks Sachi and Fazmotron. Double points! I wish I'd realised the commentary could be used to get all the stills. Much easier than freeze framing... Question fixed (and changed a bit because it would be too easy without the curve-ball of Yui's non-appearance).

[]: Re: eva series quiz             Quote Post by ath » Sun Feb 20, 2011 7:39 am Sachi wrote: 2, 3, 4, 5, 7, 9, 10, 12, 14, 15, 17, 18, 21, 22, 23, 26, 26'. Someone correct me on this.

[]: Re: eva series quiz             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Feb 20, 2011 7:41 am Sachi wrote: 2, 3, 4, 5, 7, 9, 10, 12, 14, 15, 17, 18, 21, 22, 23, 26, 26'. Someone correct me on this.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei Makes You Go Splat » Sun Feb 20, 2011 3:34 pm I got 20. I probably would have been able to guess the Pen-Pen one, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Spud » Sun Feb 20, 2011 3:39 pm Hmm .... I really need to rewatch the series I know what I'm doing next week
